title: Add shared team memory directory (parity with CC teamMemPaths.ts)
description:
## Goal

Implement shared team memory directory support, porting CC's `teamMemPaths.ts` (CC ~292 lines) and `teamMemPrompts.ts` (CC ~100 lines).

## CC source behavior

- `getTeamMemPath()` → `<autoMemPath>/team/` (trailing separator, NFC-normalized)
- `getTeamMemEntrypoint()` → `<autoMemPath>/team/MEMORY.md`
- `isTeamMemoryEnabled()` → false if autoMemory disabled; otherwise gated on feature flag
- `isTeamMemPath(filePath)` → string-level containment check (resolves `..` via `path.resolve`)
- `validateTeamMemWritePath(filePath)` → two-pass validation: (1) resolve `..` + string containment, (2) `realpath` deepest-existing-ancestor + confirm within real teamDir (catches symlink escapes)
- `validateTeamMemKey(relativeKey)` → sanitize null bytes, URL-encoded traversals, Unicode NFKC-normalized traversals, backslashes, absolute paths; then same two-pass as above
- Path traversal security: `PathTraversalError` on: null byte, URL-encoded `../`, Unicode NFKC `．．／`, backslash, dangling symlink, symlink loop (`ELOOP`), unresolvable ancestor
- `buildCombinedMemoryPrompt()` → combined auto+team prompt with scope guidance (two-directory system, `## Memory scope` section)
- Team MEMORY.md index is loaded and injected alongside private MEMORY.md (both truncated via same `truncateEntrypointContent`)

## OC counterpart

None. No team memory directory support exists in `src/memdir/`. This is a CC parity gap tracked here.

## Done when

- `src/memdir/team_paths.rs` implements `get_team_mem_path`, `is_team_mem_path`, `validate_team_mem_write_path`, `validate_team_mem_key` with equivalent security properties
- Path traversal test matrix covers: null byte, URL-encoded `../`, Unicode `．．／`, backslash, dangling symlink, real symlink escape
- `src/memdir/team_prompts.rs` implements `build_combined_memory_prompt` matching CC structure
- Feature-flagged behind config (team memory opt-in)

## Related

- Parent audit: #523
- Spec issue: #533
- Phase 1 spec: this gap was discovered during #533 spec extraction
